name: 9Yards Golf Course Simulators & Lounge of Washington, PA
about: 9Yards Golf Course Simulators & Lounge of Washington, PA is a golf simulator venue that blends world-class technology with a social atmosphere. They feature Golfzon TwoVision Simulators, which are noted for their hyper-realistic experience and are the first of their kind in Western Pennsylvania. The venue offers a space for casual play, group events, and golf practice, designed to be accessible to both avid golfers and newcomers. Pricing includes a first-time discount and is structured for individuals and teams, with a particular emphasis on hosting corporate and private events in their private rooms.
why_golfers_like_it: Top-tier Golfzon TwoVision Simulator technology rated #1 by Golf Digest
Two private event rooms that can accommodate up to 60 guests combined
No need for advance tee times; play year-round regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: Handcrafted food menu available; catering services also provided for events.
Full bar and drink service available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Award-winning simulator with auto-tee, ball retrieval, and 24-position moving floor plate.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, high-quality golf clubs are provided on-site as part of the complimentary selection. Left-handed clubs are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and handcrafted food menu. No mention of a BYOB policy is found.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It should take approximately two hours for a team to complete 18 holes of golf.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a family-friendly environment and hosts birthday parties for various ages.
